goal: Make the main player feel like they are scuba diving through cytoplasm with a buoyancy control for up/down movement.

changes: Added a local MainCellScubaBuoyancyRig attached to the player's torso/root with twin tanks, back plate, and trim valve glow.
Changed vertical movement from direct rise/sink thrust into persistent buoyancyTrim.
Added inflate/vent touch controls using + and - buttons.
Mapped keyboard Space to inflate and Ctrl/Q to vent.
Mapped Quest/gamepad A/R1 to inflate and B/L1 to vent.
Added MainCellBuoyancyBubbles particle feedback while adjusting buoyancy.
Added a mobile BuoyancyGauge showing positive/negative trim.

control_model.vertical_swim: persistent buoyancy trim applied through VectorForce

device_review_needed: Android: confirm + and - buttons inflate/vent and produce persistent climb/sink.
Android: confirm horizontal pad still swims while buoyancy trim is active.
Quest: confirm A/R1 inflates and B/L1 vents.
Quest: confirm the player can hover by returning buoyancy near neutral.
